<!-- from ../../src/doc/chapters/variables.md -->

## Variables

It is possible to predefine variable values usable in
other commands in file path arguments (e.g. [include](commands.md#include)) or execution argument for [execute](commands.md#execute). They are defined by the special command `variable` which produces
no substitution.

<pre>
{{variable}{&lt;name>}{&lt;value>}&rcub;
</pre>

Variable values are used by a substitution expression of the form `$(<name>)` inside
appropriate command arguments. Variable definitions may again use variables, but there must be no cycle.

e.g.:
<pre>
{{variable}{democmd}{$(root)/democmd}}
</pre>
